_tooltips.database: Structured lists you can filter and sort to find the best fit.
_tooltips.hub: The main landing pages for each category—start here to explore everything in one place.
_tooltips.radar: Visual scorecards that summarize strengths and weaknesses at a glance.
_tooltips.shapes: A visual catalogue of shapes/profiles to help understand fit and ergonomics.
_tooltips.versus: Side‑by‑side comparisons to quickly see what’s different and what wins.
